field.expression: select SECCION.id_seccion from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1
field.label: Sección
Linea
field.expression: select SECCION.linea_id from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1

field.label: Categ.
field.expression: (select descripcion from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') /*CONCAT(RIGHT(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 4), SUBSTRING(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 3, 2), LEFT(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 2)) */ order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1)

select tipoliq FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) limit 1
field.label: Tipo Liq.
importe
field.expression: select importe FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= hasta and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.idCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

field.label: Premio
field.expression: select ifnull(premio,0) FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= hasta and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

(select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1)

CASE (select SECCION.linea_id from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) WHEN 1 THEN /*(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PEDCOTIZ where terminacionFinal >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and terminacionFinal <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y')) */
(CASE WHEN (select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) != 6 THEN
(select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = (select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id != 6 )
ELSE
(( (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 2)+
(select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 3)+
(select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 5)
) / 3)
END)
/* Herreria2 Chaperia3 Terminacion5 PLastico6*/
WHEN 3 THEN (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = 2 and orden_control = 999 ) WHEN 5 THEN (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = 3 and orden_control = 999 ) END

field.label: montoPre
field.expression: select ifnull(montoPremio,0) from PREMIOS where cantidad = '[__coches__]'

field.label: Faltas
% premio
field.expression: select case when '[__Faltas__]' = '' then 0 else (select FALTAS.porcentaje from FALTAS where FALTAS.faltas = TRUNCATE([__Faltas__] + 0, 0)) end

field.label: Desc
field.expression: select sum(RHD.importe * RHMOTIVODESC.imputacion) from RHDESCUENTOS as RHD left join RHMOTIVODESC on RHMOTIVODESC.idMotivoDesc = RHD.idMotivoDesc where RHD.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and RHD.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and RHD.legajo = [__legajo__] and RHD.sobre_extras = 0

field.label: Horas
field.expression:
select SEC_TO_TIME(sum(FF.minutos)) from (select ifnull(time_to_sec( timediff( case when (select convert(H1.hora using UTF8) from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 1, 1) > (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) then (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) else (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 1, 1) end , case when (select convert(H1.hora using UTF8) from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 0, 1) < (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) then (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) else (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 0, 1) end ) ), 0) + ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff(
case when (select convert(H1.hora using UTF8) from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 3, 1) > (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) then (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) else (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 3, 1) end , case when (select convert(H1.hora using UTF8) from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 2, 1) < (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) then (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) else (select convert(H1.hora using UTF8) from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = F1.tarjeta and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 limit 2, 1) end )), 0) as "minutos" from FICHADAS as F1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha
where F1.tarjeta = [__tarjeta__] and F1.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and F1.borrado = 0 and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)
GROUP BY F1.fecha ) as FF

field.label: Feriados
field.expression: select SEC_TO_TIME(sum(TIME_TO_SEC(FERIADOS.horas))) from FERIADOS where FERIADOS.idFeriado >= '[__desde__]' and FERIADOS.idFeriado <= '[__hasta__]'
